meta.title: Cheqify.app — Print Error-Free Cheques
meta.description: Print, track, and manage cheques from any device. 300+ Indian banks, MICR validation, batch printing. Free forever.

slides.description: Print, track, and manage cheques from any device. Works with 300+ Indian banks. Automatic amount-in-words, MICR validation, and batch printing.
SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, PNB, Kotak, and hundreds more. Every bank layout pre-loaded with correct MICR positioning. Just select your bank and print.
Know instantly if a cheque is deposited, cleared, or bounced. Get real-time alerts, auto-reminders for post-dated cheques, and a complete audit trail.

hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever for basic use.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Description: Enter payee details, amount, and select your bank. Cheqify formats everything automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: Print on any standard cheque leaf using your regular printer. Error-free, every time.

featuresTabs.heading: Everything You Need to Manage Cheques
featuresTabs.subheading: Explore the three pillars of Cheqify
featuresTabs.printingDescription: Print perfectly formatted cheques in seconds. Supports all major Indian bank formats. Auto-fills amount in words, validates MICR codes, and prevents common errors that cause bounces.
featuresTabs.trackingDescription: Track every cheque from issue to clearance. Know instantly which cheques have been deposited, cleared, or returned. Never lose track of a payment again.
featuresTabs.dashboardDescription: Get a bird's-eye view of all cheque activity across your business. Monitor team performance, track outstanding payments, and make data-driven decisions.

testimonials.heading: What Our Users Say
testimonials.t1Quote: Cheqify eliminated cheque errors completely. We used to have 2-3 bounced cheques a month due to handwriting mistakes. Now zero.
testimonials.t2Quote: The lifecycle tracking saved us hours every week. I no longer need to call vendors to ask if they deposited the cheque.
testimonials.t3Quote: I only print 2-3 cheques a year but Cheqify makes it effortless. The free plan is perfect for personal use.

meta.title: Features | Cheqify.app
meta.description: Explore Cheqify's powerful cheque printing, lifecycle tracking, and owner dashboard features designed for modern businesses.

hero.subheadline: A centralized platform designed to handle the complexity of cheque management with editorial-grade simplicity and iron-clad security.

core.heading: Discover Features
core.subheading: Cheqify provides a comprehensive suite of tools to modernize your cheque management workflow.
core.feature1Description: Just select your bank from 300+ pre-loaded Indian bank layouts and start printing instantly. No manual setup, no template creation — everything is ready to use out of the box.
core.feature2Description: Automatically fills amount in words, formats dates per bank requirements, and suggests payees from your saved contacts. Eliminates manual typing errors completely.
core.feature3Description: Manage multiple chequebooks across different bank accounts within a single organization. Track cheque ranges, usage status, and remaining leaves for every chequebook — all from one dashboard.
core.feature3ScreenshotAlt: Chequebook management dashboard showing multiple bank accounts and cheque ranges
core.feature4Description: Print hundreds of cheques at once for vendor payments. Import cheque data directly from Excel or CSV files — save hours of manual data entry.
core.feature5Description: Track every cheque through its complete journey: Unused, Prepared, Signed, Issued, Cleared. Real-time status updates keep you informed at every stage.
core.feature6Description: Instant alerts for bounced cheques, stop payment requests, and post-dated cheque reminders before due dates. Never miss a critical payment event.
core.feature7Description: Bird's-eye view of all cheque activity, outstanding payments, and trends. Data-driven charts and insights help you make informed financial decisions.
core.feature8Description: Manage cheques across multiple companies and projects from a single account. Role-based access controls who can print, approve, and monitor.
core.feature9Description: Track team activity with full accountability. Every action is logged with timestamps and user identity — always audit-ready.
core.feature10Description: Export data in PDF, Excel, CSV. Match issued cheques with bank statements. Complete payment history searchable by date, payee, or amount.
core.feature11Description: Manage your cheques on the go from any smartphone or tablet. The fully responsive interface adapts to any screen size — review, approve, and track cheques from anywhere, anytime.

highlights.heading: Precision Engineering
highlights.subheading: Micro-features that define the macro experience of elite financial management.
highlights.card1Description: Every action, from click to print, is logged with high-fidelity timestamps and user identity for total accountability.
highlights.card2Description: Consolidate records across hundreds of accounts. Manage diverse bank formats within a single, unified interface.
highlights.card3Description: Smart notifications for PDC (Post-Dated Cheques) ensure you maintain liquidity before clearing dates arrive.
highlights.card4Description: Intuitive interface that anyone on your team can use from day one — no manuals, no onboarding sessions needed.
highlights.card5Description: Desktop, tablet, or phone — access Cheqify from anywhere with no software installation required.
highlights.card6Description: 256-bit encryption and secure data handling ensure your financial information stays protected at all times.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about Cheqify's features.
faq.faq1Question: How many bank layouts does Cheqify support?
faq.faq1Answer: Cheqify supports 300+ pre-built bank layouts covering all major Indian banks including SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, PNB, Bank of Baroda, Kotak Mahindra, and many more. New layouts are added regularly based on user requests.
faq.faq2Question: Can I import cheque data from Excel?
faq.faq2Answer: Yes, Cheqify supports batch importing from Excel and CSV files. Simply upload your file with payee names, amounts, and dates — Cheqify handles the rest, including auto-filling amount in words and formatting.
faq.faq3Question: How does cheque lifecycle tracking work?
faq.faq3Answer: Every cheque is tracked through its complete journey: Unused → Prepared → Signed → Issued → Cleared or Bounced. You get real-time status updates, alerts for bounced cheques, and reminders for post-dated cheques before their due dates.
faq.faq4Answer: Absolutely. Cheqify uses 256-bit encryption for all data in transit and at rest. Your financial data is never shared with third parties. Every action is logged with timestamps and user identity for complete audit readiness.
faq.faq5Question: Can multiple team members use Cheqify?
faq.faq5Answer: Yes, Cheqify supports multi-user access with role-based permissions. You can control who can print, approve, and monitor cheques. The owner dashboard gives a bird's-eye view of all team activity across companies and projects.

meta.title: About Us | Cheqify.app
meta.description: Learn about Cheqify's mission to simplify cheque management for Indian businesses. Meet the team behind the product.

hero.headline: Simplifying cheque management for every Indian business.
hero.subheadline: We believe every business deserves error-free cheque printing — without paying for it. Cheqify was built to make that a reality.

story.heading: Why we built Cheqify.
story.paragraph1: For decades, Indian businesses have relied on handwritten cheques — a process riddled with errors, bounces, and wasted time. Small business owners, accountants, and finance teams deserved better.
story.paragraph2: We started Cheqify with a simple observation: printing a cheque should be as easy as printing a letter. No expensive software, no complex setup, no recurring fees. Just pick your bank, enter the details, and print.
story.quote: Every bounced cheque costs time, money, and trust. We built Cheqify so that never has to happen again.
story.badgeDescription: MICR validation and bank-format verification ensure every cheque prints correctly.

values.heading: What We Stand For
values.subheading: The principles that guide everything we build.
values.value1Description: We strip away complexity so you can focus on what matters. No training manuals, no onboarding calls — just sign up and start printing.
values.value1Description2: Select your bank, fill in the details, and hit print — it takes less than 2 minutes. Our clean, distraction-free interface is designed so anyone on your team can use it from day one, whether they're tech-savvy or not.
values.value2Description: Every cheque printed through Cheqify is validated for MICR codes, amounts, and formatting. Zero errors, zero bounces.
values.value3Description: Cheque management shouldn't be a luxury. Our core product is free forever — no hidden costs, no surprise bills.
values.value4Description: 300+ bank formats, multi-language support, and workflows designed for how Indian businesses actually operate.

cta.heading: Ready to simplify your cheque management?
cta.subheading: Join thousands of Indian businesses that trust Cheqify. Start free — no credit card required.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Cheqify.app
meta.description: Learn how Cheqify collects, uses, and protects your data. Read our full privacy policy covering contact forms, analytics, and cookies.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: Your trust is our most valuable asset. This policy outlines how we protect and manage your data.

sections.introP1: Welcome to Cheqify.app. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This policy applies to all information collected through our website and any related services.
sections.introP2: When you use our services, you trust us with your personal data. We take this responsibility seriously and aim to be transparent about what we collect and how we use it.
sections.directDescription: We collect your name, email address, and message when you submit the contact form via Formspree. We do not store this data on our servers — it is processed by Formspree.
sections.automatedDescription: When you accept cookies, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) collects page views and usage data. Tawk.to live chat collects chat transcripts. No tracking occurs without your consent.
sections.usageIntro: We process your information for the following purposes:
sections.usage1: To respond to your contact form inquiries and provide support.
sections.usage2: To analyze website traffic and improve user experience via GA4.
sections.usage3: To provide real-time chat support via Tawk.to.
sections.usage4: To remember your cookie consent and language preferences.
sections.securityP1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. Our website is served over HTTPS and all third-party integrations follow industry security standards.
sections.securityP2: However, no electronic transmission over the internet can be guaranteed to be 100% secure. We strive to protect your data but cannot guarantee absolute security.
sections.rightsIntro: You have certain rights regarding your personal data under applicable data protection laws:

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may contact us at:
contact.address: 813, Silver Trade Center, Near Moon Garden, VIP Circle, Utran, Surat 394105

meta.title: Terms of Use | Cheqify.app
meta.description: Read the terms and conditions for using Cheqify.app cheque printing and management platform. Covers usage policies, data handling, and user responsibilities.

hero.title: Terms of Use
hero.description: Please read these terms carefully before using our services.

sections.acceptanceP1: By accessing or using Cheqify.app (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
sections.acceptanceP2: These terms apply to all users of the platform including individuals, businesses, accountants, and any other parties who access or use Cheqify.
sections.eligibilityP1: You must be at least 18 years of age and legally authorized to enter into contracts under Indian law to use this Service. By using Cheqify, you represent that you meet these requirements and that the information you provide is accurate.
sections.useIntro: Cheqify is provided for lawful cheque management purposes. You agree to:
sections.use1: Use the Service only for legitimate cheque printing, tracking, and management purposes.
sections.use2: Ensure all cheque details entered are accurate, complete, and authorized by the account holder.
sections.use3: Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials and restrict access to authorized team members only.
sections.use4: Comply with all applicable banking regulations, RBI guidelines, and Indian financial laws.
sections.prohibitedIntro: You agree not to use Cheqify for any unlawful or unauthorized purpose, including but not limited to:
sections.prohibited1: Printing cheques on accounts you are not authorized to operate.
sections.prohibited2: Forging, altering, or creating fraudulent cheques or financial instruments.
sections.prohibited3: Attempting to reverse-engineer, hack, or disrupt the platform or its infrastructure.
sections.prohibited4: Using the Service to violate any applicable law, regulation, or third-party rights.
sections.disclaimerP1: Cheqify is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the reliability, accuracy, or availability of the Service. While we strive for pixel-perfect cheque alignment and error-free printing, the final responsibility for verifying cheque details lies with the user.
sections.disclaimerP2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted access to the Service. Scheduled maintenance, updates, or unforeseen technical issues may temporarily affect availability.
sections.liabilityP1: To the fullest extent permitted by Indian law, Cheqify and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. This includes but is not limited to cheque bounces, financial losses, printing errors, or data loss. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the Service (if any).
sections.governingP1: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Surat, Gujarat, India.
sections.changesP1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.heading: Questions?
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at:
contact.address: 813, Silver Trade Center, Near Moon Garden, VIP Circle, Utran, Surat 394105

faq.q1: Is Cheqify really free compared to ChequePot?
faq.a1: Yes, Cheqify is 100% free with all features included. ChequePot charges for basic cheque printing functionality. Cheqify offers 300+ bank formats, lifecycle tracking, batch printing, and team management at zero cost.
faq.q2: How does Cheqify compare to ChequePot in features?
faq.a2: Cheqify offers significantly more features than ChequePot including automatic MICR validation, lifecycle tracking, owner dashboard, team management, multi-language support (English, Hindi, Gujarati), mobile responsive design, and export reports in PDF, Excel, and CSV formats.
faq.q3: Can I switch from ChequePot to Cheqify?
faq.a3: Yes, switching is easy. Sign up for free at Cheqify, select your bank from 300+ pre-loaded formats, and start printing cheques immediately. No data migration needed — just start fresh with better tools at zero cost.
